rationale: Precise real-time derivatives metrics (funding rate, OI) and computed 30-day correlations require authenticated API access or paid tiers on Coinglass/CoinGecko Pro/Bloomberg; none of the specified free-tier sources expose these as ready-to-read public values without login or payment.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/pro/futures/FundingRate — funding rate table visible in UI but machine-readable bulk export requires account/API key
https://www.coinglass.com/pro/futures/OpenInterest — OI chart visible but structured free API endpoint not publicly documented
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/ripple — price history downloadable (CSV, 365d) for manual correlation calc, but pre-computed correlation figures NOT provided
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — sentiment only, no correlation or derivatives data
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/ — NASDAQ/macro data available but cross-asset correlation computation must be done manually; not pre-computed for XRP

notes.funding_rate_8h: Coinglass public page (coinglass.com/en/currencies/XRP) displays a funding rate chart but the current numeric value is rendered dynamically and gated; no free unauthenticated JSON endpoint confirmed.
notes.open_interest_usd: Same Coinglass page shows OI chart; aggregate USD figure across exchanges is not available in a freely accessible static endpoint.
notes.correlations: Could be manually computed using CoinGecko's free /coins/{id}/market_chart API (daily closes, 30 days) for XRP vs BTC and ETH, and FRED NASDAQCOM series for NASDAQ — but this requires computation, not a direct pull, and NASDAQ correlation would need careful date alignment. Pre-computed values are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER from any listed source.
